title: Ex Nihilo: Sequentia - Abnormals Addon
description: An addon for Ex Nihilo: Sequentia for Abnormals mods
body:
Ex Nihilo: Sequentia - Abnormals Addon adds a variety of features to connect the Ex Nihilo gameplay to Abnormals vanilla+ mods. ![Ex Nihilo: Sequentia - Abnormals Addon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Yp7Vs5fk/images/44ad8324e0dc8c8658a8bfb702d3d25d4bdc4695.png) ## Features This addon currently adds: - Sieve, barrel, and crucible variants for all Abnormals wood types - Methods of obtaining Abnormals plants, crops, and resources - Heating crucibles with Abnormals heat sources - Coral larva for all Upgrade Aquatic corals - Crushed travertine variants - Adjustments to getting berry pips from sieving to work with Berry Good - Miscellaneous sieve and crucible recipes ## Licence
